methodology.ranking_basis: Reviewed 2023 harmonized economy-wide GHG excluding LULUCF (AR6 GWP100), descending magnitude with competition ties
methodology.queue_rule: First 20 ranked entities; evidence gaps are derived only from committed CT-11 metadata and CT-01 source decisions
